visa_type_detail.name: Visitor Visa for Visiting Relatives

requirements.application_form: Completed & signed application form, filled out online via https://visawebapp.boca.gov.tw
requirements.photos: Two passport-size (45 mm in height and 35 mm in width) photos in color within 6 months, with a white color background
requirements.passport: Original & photocopy, valid for 6 months with blank pages
requirements.proof_of_relative: Household Registration Transcript within 3 months (personal family registry information should be indicated in the notes column of Household Registration Transcript), Alien Residence Certificate or Permanent Residence Certificate
requirements.proof_of_relationship: Birth Certificate or Household Registration, etc., relevant identified documents
requirements.other_documents: Ticket, electronic ticket, proof of a travel agency, proof of current profession or other documents required for individual cases

visa_type_detail.procedures: Applicants can lodge their applications with the necessary documents and statutory fee at our overseas missions. Interview may be required when necessary.
visa_type_detail.notes: Visas are issued as stipulated by Article 12 of the Statute Governing Issuance of ROC Visas for Foreign Passports. As a sovereign nation, the ROC has the right to refuse applications for visas without providing any explanation for such decisions; visa application fee is not refundable.

essential_apps.description: Official app for government services, including social welfare and identity verification.
Taiwan's National Health Insurance app for medical appointments, records, and information.
Real-time public bus arrival information across Taiwan.
Widely used mobile payment and remittance service in Taiwan.
